description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build Brew Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes inputs for Ice version, repository URL, and repository username, and optional secrets for repository password and Ice nightly publish token. It checks out the repository on a macOS environment, sets up C++ and cache, updates the nightly tap, uploads a nightly bottle to a repository, pushes the nightly tap to a GitHub repository using a publish token, and uploads artifacts.
